fixVerification.fixDescription: Preset filter pills now render as non-interactive <span> elements without remove buttons or hover effects when displayFilters is false. A new .archive-preset-filters container and .archive-preset-pill CSS class were added.
fixVerification.previousIssueResolved: FQA-002 from functional-qa-2026-02-17-132636.json (minor — data-preset-filters emitting [] instead of {}). Note: this fix did NOT address FQA-002; that remains as a pre-existing minor note. However no new issues were introduced by this fix.

build.detail: TypeScript compiles without errors. bun run build succeeds. No Archive-specific lint errors. Two pre-existing warnings in Archive.tsx (lines 81, 104: react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) are unchanged and carry over from prior QA run.

presetPillsNoRemoveButton.requirement: Preset pills render without X/remove buttons when displayFilters=false
presetPillsNoRemoveButton.evidence: Section 15 ('Curated Resources', displayFilters=false, presetFilters={audience:[students]}): page audit confirms presetFilterContainer found=true, presetPillSpan found=true (count:1), interactivePillButton found=false (count:0), removeFilterDiv found=false (count:0). PHP condition at Archive.php:344 gates .archive-preset-filters on (! $displayFilters && ! empty($preset_filters) && $has_selected_option). The rendered <span> contains only the label text — no child .archive-remove-filter div.

presetPillsNoHoverEffect.requirement: Preset pills have no hover effect (no gradient animation)
presetPillsNoHoverEffect.evidence: PHP Archive.php:352 emits: <span class="archive-preset-pill inline-flex items-center border border-current rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-body-small uppercase font-medium tracking-wider">. No cursor-pointer class, no hover: utility classes, no animation/gradient classes. Archive.js adds zero event listeners to .archive-preset-filters — the presetFiltersSelector variable is used only for AJAX innerHTML refresh (lines 132-137), not for click/hover handlers.

presetPillsUseSpan.evidence: PHP Archive.php:352 confirmed as <span class="archive-preset-pill ...">. Page audit selector 'presetPillSpan' (.archive-preset-pill) found=true on section 15; selector 'interactivePillButton' (.archive-active-filters button[data-field]) found=false on section 15. The element is non-interactive and correctly excluded from tab order.

ajaxRefreshesPresetPills.requirement: AJAX updates correctly refresh preset pills
ajaxRefreshesPresetPills.evidence: Archive.js lines 132-137 (newly added in this fix): var newPresetFilters = responseSection.querySelector(presetFiltersSelector); var oldPresetFilters = section.querySelector(presetFiltersSelector); if (oldPresetFilters && newPresetFilters) { oldPresetFilters.innerHTML = newPresetFilters.innerHTML; }. This mirrors the existing activeFilters refresh pattern at lines 126-130 and uses the same presetFiltersSelector ('.archive-preset-filters') variable declared at line 6. The guard (oldPresetFilters && newPresetFilters) ensures it only runs when both sides exist — correct, since this container only renders on displayFilters=false sections. Sections without a preset pill container are unaffected.

interactivePillsUnchanged.requirement: Interactive filter pills (displayFilters=true) still have remove buttons and hover effects
interactivePillsUnchanged.evidence: Section 14 ('Preset Filtered Resources', displayFilters=true, presetFilters={audience:[students]}): page audit confirms activeFiltersBar found=true, interactivePillButton found=true (count:1), removeFilterDiv found=true (count:1), filterForm found=true. The .archive-active-filters block in PHP (lines 320-340) is unchanged — still gated on ($show_filters && $displayFilters), still emits <button data-field data-value> with <div class="archive-remove-filter"> inside. The buildButtons() JS function still inserts interactive button HTML including the remove div (Archive.js:302-308).

regressionCheck.detail: All 16 block instances render correctly. Sections without presetFilters show no .archive-preset-filters container (correct — PHP condition requires ! empty($preset_filters)). Sections with displayFilters=true and presetFilters show the interactive .archive-active-filters bar with buttons, not the non-interactive span pills. No regressions detected in filter form rendering, per-page selectors, load-more button, or pagination across all variants.

passedChecks: Preset pills have no cursor-pointer, no hover classes, no animation classes
No .archive-remove-filter div inside preset pill spans
No JS click/hover handlers attached to .archive-preset-filters
AJAX loadResults() refreshes .archive-preset-filters innerHTML when present
Interactive pills in .archive-active-filters (displayFilters=true) retain <button data-field> + .archive-remove-filter — unchanged
Section 15 (displayFilters=false): presetFilterContainer found, activeFiltersBar absent — correct
Section 14 (displayFilters=true): activeFiltersBar with interactive pill found, presetFilterContainer absent — correct
TSX/PHP sync: no $attributes[] extraction, docblock complete
